description_long: This is a small, single-engine airplane with a high-wing configuration and a sleek, streamlined fuselage. The body is predominantly blue with white and blue accent stripes, and the wings and tail surfaces are light gray with blue tips and stripes. The cockpit is located at the front of the fuselage and features a clear, enclosed canopy with visible windows. The landing gear is fixed in a tricycle arrangement, with two main wheels under the wings and a single nose wheel. The tail section is conventional, with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers extending from either side. The propeller is mounted at the nose, indicating a piston engine setup.
description: A small, blue and gray high-wing airplane with a single nose-mounted propeller, fixed tricycle landing gear, and a conventional tail. The cockpit is enclosed and positioned at the front of the fuselage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the high-mounted wings, nose propeller, and tricycle landing gear with the cockpit windows visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the streamlined fuselage, cockpit placement, and the fixed main and nose landing gear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail section with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, as well as the wing span.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the propeller and cockpit.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, straight wings with slight dihedral and squared wingtips; no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and one nose wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with side windows, likely single or dual seat.
